calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Discharged

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Off Calendar

Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion For An Order Enforcing Terms Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ramsey Hanafi of Quintana Hanafi Pungprakearti LLP (415.504.3121 ext. 103) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF HEATHER MCLEISH'S Motion For An Order Enforcing Terms Of Settlement Agreement is GRANTED. Ms. McLeish has established the existence of a written settlement signed by all the parties that is enforceable per CCP 664.5 and the breach of the monetary terms of that settlement. Ms. McLeish is entitled to a judgment in her favor and against all defendants in the amount of $87,000 plus costs. Defendant Hugo Delgado's assertions that his prior counsel failed to represent him and the other defendants properly is not a basis to deny this motion. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion For An Order Enforcing Terms Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Continued To Oct-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Rory C. Quintana of Quintana Hanafi LLP (415.916.5542) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Nicole R. MacKenzie of Williams Kastner & Gibbs PLLC 9206-628-6600) Appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Williams Kastner & Gibbs PLLC's Motion to be relieved as counsel for the DEFENDANTS SKY KRUSE, EQCO, INC. AND GILFUND US, LLC'S is GRANTED. Ms. MacKenzie shall submit a judicial council form of [proposed] written order. A hearing is set for a Motion to Enforce Settlement on October 14, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Opposition is due by October 5, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
